name: coastalkey-enterprise
description: Coastal Key Enterprise AI Operations Platform — Monorepo

scripts.dev:mobile: cd ck-mobile-app && npx wrangler pages dev . --port 8788
scripts.dev:builder: cd ck-app-builder && npx wrangler pages dev . --port 8789
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:gateway && npm run deploy:sentinel && npm run deploy:cc && npm run deploy:mobile && npm run deploy:builder
scripts.test: npm run test:gateway && npm run test:sentinel
